message:
🐛 Fix GoReleaser to skip Homebrew when token not set

- Add skip_upload condition to brews section
- Change format to formats array (fixes deprecation)
- Release now succeeds even without HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -30,7 +30,8 @@ archives:
   - id: kkc-agent
     builds:
       - kkc-agent
-    format: tar.gz
+    formats:
+      - tar.gz
     name_template: "{{ .ProjectName }}_{{ .Version }}_{{ .Os }}_{{ .Arch }}"
 
 checksum:
@@ -44,8 +45,11 @@ changelog:
       - "^test:"
       - "^chore:"
 
+# Homebrew tap - only runs if HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN is set
 brews:
   - name: kkc-agent
+    # Skip if token is not set
+    skip_upload: '{{ if .Env.HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN }}false{{ else }}true{{ end }}'
     repository:
       owner: kubestellar
       name: homebrew-tap
